visuals.title: File System Implementation
visuals.description: Animated diagram showing allocation methods (contiguous, linked, indexed), free space management with bit vectors, and a comparison table
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="400" data-topic-id="file-system-implementation">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bgGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E8EAF6"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#C5CAE9"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowTeal" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="5" refX="6" refY="2.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0,0 7,2.5 0,5" fill="#00695C"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="arrowOrange" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="5" refX="6" refY="2.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0,0 7,2.5 0,5" fill="#E65100"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="400" fill="url(#bgGrad)" rx="12"/>

  <!-- Group 1: Title -->
  <g data-narration="File System Implementation covers how the OS stores files on disk using allocation methods and manages free space." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="22" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="#283593">File System Implementation</text>
    <line x1="80" y1="28" x2="340" y2="28" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Group 2: Contiguous Allocation -->
  <g data-narration="Contiguous Allocation: a file occupies consecutive disk blocks such as 5, 6, 7, 8. This gives fast sequential and direct access but causes external fragmentation." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="14" y="46" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">1. Contiguous Allocation</text>
    <!-- Disk bar: blocks 0-11, each 30px wide with 2px gap -->
    <rect x="14" y="52" width="26" height="20" rx="2" fill="#E0E0E0" stroke="#9E9E9E" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="27" y="65" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#757575">0</text>
    <rect x="42" y="52" width="26" height="20" rx="2" fill="#E0E0E0" stroke="#9E9E9E" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="55" y="65" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#757575">1</text>
    <rect x="70" y="52" width="26" height="20" rx="2" fill="#E0E0E0" stroke="#9E9E9E" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="83" y="65" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#757575">2</text>
    <rect x="98" y="52" width="26" height="20" rx="2" fill="#E0E0E0" stroke="#9E9E9E" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="111" y="65" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#757575">3</text>
    <rect x="126" y="52" width="26" height="20" rx="2" fill="#E0E0E0" stroke="#9E9E9E" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="139" y="65" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#757575">4</text>
    <!-- Highlighted file blocks 5,6,7,8 -->
    <rect x="154" y="52" width="26" height="20" rx="2" fill="#3949AB" stroke="#283593" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="167" y="65" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="white">5</text>
    <rect x="182" y="52" width="26" height="20" rx="2" fill="#3949AB" stroke="#283593" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="195" y="65" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="white">6</text>
    <rect x="210" y="52" width="26" height="20" rx="2" fill="#3949AB" stroke="#283593" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="223" y="65" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="white">7</text>
    <rect x="238" y="52" width="26" height="20" rx="2" fill="#3949AB" stroke="#283593" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="251" y="65" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="white">8</text>
    <!-- Remaining blocks -->
    <rect x="266" y="52" width="26" height="20" rx="2" fill="#E0E0E0" stroke="#9E9E9E" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="279" y="65" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#757575">9</text>
    <rect x="294" y="52" width="26" height="20" rx="2" fill="#E0E0E0" stroke="#9E9E9E" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="307" y="65" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#757575">10</text>
    <rect x="322" y="52" width="26" height="20" rx="2" fill="#E0E0E0" stroke="#9E9E9E" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="335" y="65" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#757575">11</text>
    <!-- Bracket -->
    <line x1="154" y1="76" x2="264" y2="76" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="209" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#3949AB">File A [5,6,7,8]</text>
    <text x="14" y="96" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#C62828">Fast access | External fragmentation</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Group 3: Linked Allocation -->
  <g data-narration="Linked Allocation: each block stores a pointer to the next block in the file, forming a chain like 5 to 8 to 2 to 11. This eliminates external fragmentation but random access is slow." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="14" y="114" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#00695C">2. Linked Allocation</text>
    <!-- Block 5 -->
    <rect x="14" y="120" width="52" height="28" rx="4" fill="#00695C" stroke="#004D40" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="40" y="133" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="white">Blk 5</text>
    <text x="40" y="143" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#B2DFDB">ptr->8</text>
    <!-- Arrow 5->8 -->
    <line x1="66" y1="134" x2="98" y2="134" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrowTeal)"/>
    <!-- Block 8 -->
    <rect x="100" y="120" width="52" height="28" rx="4" fill="#00695C" stroke="#004D40" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="126" y="133" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="white">Blk 8</text>
    <text x="126" y="143" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#B2DFDB">ptr->2</text>
    <!-- Arrow 8->2 -->
    <line x1="152" y1="134" x2="184" y2="134" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrowTeal)"/>
    <!-- Block 2 -->
    <rect x="186" y="120" width="52" height="28" rx="4" fill="#00695C" stroke="#004D40" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="212" y="133" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="white">Blk 2</text>
    <text x="212" y="143" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#B2DFDB">ptr->11</text>
    <!-- Arrow 2->11 -->
    <line x1="238" y1="134" x2="270" y2="134" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrowTeal)"/>
    <!-- Block 11 -->
    <rect x="272" y="120" width="52" height="28" rx="4" fill="#00695C" stroke="#004D40" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="298" y="133" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="white">Blk 11</text>
    <text x="298" y="143" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#B2DFDB">null</text>
    <text x="14" y="162" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#C62828">No fragmentation | Slow random access</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Group 4: Indexed Allocation -->
  <g data-narration="Indexed Allocation: an index block holds pointers to all data blocks of the file. The index block stores entries 5, 8, 2, 11 giving direct access without fragmentation, at the cost of index overhead." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="4.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="14" y="180" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#E65100">3. Indexed Allocation</text>
    <!-- Index block -->
    <rect x="14" y="186" width="60" height="48" rx="4" fill="#E65100" stroke="#BF360C" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="44" y="197" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Index Blk</text>
    <text x="44" y="207" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#FFE0B2">[0] -> 5</text>
    <text x="44" y="215" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#FFE0B2">[1] -> 8</text>
    <text x="44" y="223" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#FFE0B2">[2] -> 2</text>
    <text x="44" y="231" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#FFE0B2">[3] -> 11</text>
    <!-- Arrows from index to data blocks -->
    <line x1="74" y1="204" x2="108" y2="196" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrowOrange)"/>
    <line x1="74" y1="212" x2="108" y2="212" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrowOrange)"/>
    <line x1="74" y1="220" x2="148" y2="196" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrowOrange)"/>
    <line x1="74" y1="228" x2="148" y2="212" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrowOrange)"/>
    <!-- Data blocks in 2x2 grid -->
    <rect x="110" y="188" width="34" height="16" rx="3" fill="#FB8C00" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.8"/>
    <text x="127" y="199" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="white">Blk 5</text>
    <rect x="110" y="206" width="34" height="16" rx="3" fill="#FB8C00" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.8"/>
    <text x="127" y="217" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="white">Blk 8</text>
    <rect x="150" y="188" width="34" height="16" rx="3" fill="#FB8C00" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.8"/>
    <text x="167" y="199" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="white">Blk 2</text>
    <rect x="150" y="206" width="34" height="16" rx="3" fill="#FB8C00" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.8"/>
    <text x="167" y="217" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="white">Blk 11</text>
    <text x="14" y="246" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#C62828">Direct access, no fragmentation | Index block overhead</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Group 5: Free Space Management - Bit Vector -->
  <g data-narration="Free Space Management uses a bit vector or bitmap where each bit represents a disk block. A value of 1 means the block is allocated and 0 means free. This allows fast lookup of free blocks." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="6.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="14" y="264" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828">4. Free Space Mgmt - Bit Vector</text>
    <!-- Row labels -->
    <text x="14" y="278" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#616161">Blk:</text>
    <text x="14" y="290" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#616161">Bit:</text>
    <!-- Block 0 - used -->
    <rect x="40" y="270" width="18" height="12" rx="1" fill="#3949AB" stroke="#283593" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="49" y="279" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="white">0</text>
    <text x="49" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">1</text>
    <!-- Block 1 - used -->
    <rect x="60" y="270" width="18" height="12" rx="1" fill="#3949AB" stroke="#283593" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="69" y="279" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="white">1</text>
    <text x="69" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">1</text>
    <!-- Block 2 - free -->
    <rect x="80" y="270" width="18" height="12" rx="1" fill="#A5D6A7" stroke="#66BB6A" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="89" y="279" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#1B5E20">2</text>
    <text x="89" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" font-weight="bold" fill="#2E7D32">0</text>
    <!-- Block 3 - used -->
    <rect x="100" y="270" width="18" height="12" rx="1" fill="#3949AB" stroke="#283593" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="109" y="279" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="white">3</text>
    <text x="109" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">1</text>
    <!-- Block 4 - free -->
    <rect x="120" y="270" width="18" height="12" rx="1" fill="#A5D6A7" stroke="#66BB6A" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="129" y="279" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#1B5E20">4</text>
    <text x="129" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" font-weight="bold" fill="#2E7D32">0</text>
    <!-- Block 5 - free -->
    <rect x="140" y="270" width="18" height="12" rx="1" fill="#A5D6A7" stroke="#66BB6A" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="149" y="279" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#1B5E20">5</text>
    <text x="149" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" font-weight="bold" fill="#2E7D32">0</text>
    <!-- Block 6 - used -->
    <rect x="160" y="270" width="18" height="12" rx="1" fill="#3949AB" stroke="#283593" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="169" y="279" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="white">6</text>
    <text x="169" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">1</text>
    <!-- Block 7 - used -->
    <rect x="180" y="270" width="18" height="12" rx="1" fill="#3949AB" stroke="#283593" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="189" y="279" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="white">7</text>
    <text x="189" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">1</text>
    <!-- Block 8 - free -->
    <rect x="200" y="270" width="18" height="12" rx="1" fill="#A5D6A7" stroke="#66BB6A" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="209" y="279" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#1B5E20">8</text>
    <text x="209" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" font-weight="bold" fill="#2E7D32">0</text>
    <!-- Block 9 - used -->
    <rect x="220" y="270" width="18" height="12" rx="1" fill="#3949AB" stroke="#283593" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="229" y="279" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="white">9</text>
    <text x="229" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">1</text>
    <!-- Block 10 - free -->
    <rect x="240" y="270" width="18" height="12" rx="1" fill="#A5D6A7" stroke="#66BB6A" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="249" y="279" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="#1B5E20">10</text>
    <text x="249" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" font-weight="bold" fill="#2E7D32">0</text>
    <!-- Block 11 - used -->
    <rect x="260" y="270" width="18" height="12" rx="1" fill="#3949AB" stroke="#283593" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="269" y="279" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" fill="white">11</text>
    <text x="269" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">1</text>
    <!-- Legend -->
    <rect x="296" y="270" width="10" height="10" rx="1" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="310" y="279" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#424242">= Used (1)</text>
    <rect x="296" y="282" width="10" height="10" rx="1" fill="#A5D6A7" stroke="#66BB6A" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="310" y="291" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#424242">= Free (0)</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Group 6: Comparison Table -->
  <g data-narration="Comparison: Contiguous allocation is fast but has fragmentation. Linked allocation is flexible with no fragmentation but has slow random access. Indexed allocation balances both but adds index block overhead." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="7.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="14" y="314" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#283593">5. Comparison</text>
    <!-- Table header -->
    <rect x="14" y="320" width="96" height="16" rx="2" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="62" y="331" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Method</text>
    <rect x="112" y="320" width="138" height="16" rx="2" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="181" y="331" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Advantage</text>
    <rect x="252" y="320" width="154" height="16" rx="2" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="329" y="331" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Disadvantage</text>
    <!-- Row 1: Contiguous -->
    <rect x="14" y="338" width="96" height="16" rx="1" fill="#E8EAF6" stroke="#C5CAE9" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="62" y="349" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#3949AB">Contiguous</text>
    <rect x="112" y="338" width="138" height="16" rx="1" fill="#E8F5E9" stroke="#C8E6C9" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="181" y="349" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#2E7D32">Fast sequential + direct access</text>
    <rect x="252" y="338" width="154" height="16" rx="1" fill="#FFEBEE" stroke="#FFCDD2" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="329" y="349" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#C62828">External fragmentation</text>
    <!-- Row 2: Linked -->
    <rect x="14" y="356" width="96" height="16" rx="1" fill="#E0F2F1" stroke="#B2DFDB" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="62" y="367" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#00695C">Linked</text>
    <rect x="112" y="356" width="138" height="16" rx="1" fill="#E8F5E9" stroke="#C8E6C9" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="181" y="367" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#2E7D32">No fragmentation, flexible</text>
    <rect x="252" y="356" width="154" height="16" rx="1" fill="#FFEBEE" stroke="#FFCDD2" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="329" y="367" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#C62828">Slow random access</text>
    <!-- Row 3: Indexed -->
    <rect x="14" y="374" width="96" height="16" rx="1" fill="#FFF3E0" stroke="#FFE0B2" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="62" y="385" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#E65100">Indexed</text>
    <rect x="112" y="374" width="138" height="16" rx="1" fill="#E8F5E9" stroke="#C8E6C9" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="181" y="385" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#2E7D32">Balanced: direct + no frag</text>
    <rect x="252" y="374" width="154" height="16" rx="1" fill="#FFEBEE" stroke="#FFCDD2" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text x="329" y="385" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#C62828">Index block overhead</text>
  </g>
</svg>
